name: hf_hb_failure
description: RTC_NOINIT heartbeat-failure streak that survives ESP32 software resets. Diagnostic mechanism for issue #172 (reboot-loop visibility, spun out of #170) — accumulate the count + last code of failing heartbeats so the next 2xx heartbeat reports why the prior session's heartbeats failed. Pure C++17, host-testable.
